globalNews.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
globalNews.summary: A 10-day truce between the two countries is now in effect, with Iran-backed Hezbollah voicing support, as negotiations continue between the US and Iran.

globalNews.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
globalNews.summary: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

globalNews.title: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
globalNews.summary: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.

globalNews.title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
globalNews.summary: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

globalNews.title: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
globalNews.summary: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price quietly sets new 10-week high as trader sees $88K in weeks
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin price rallied above $77,000 amid cooling geopolitical tensions and record-high back-to-back closes for the S&P 500.

cryptoNews.title: Neo co-founder proposes $461M treasury overhaul to end ‘trust me’ governance
cryptoNews.summary: Neo’s proposed overhaul would restructure its foundation, return tokens to the community and impose formal oversight, as co-founders clash over governance and control.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto execs ramp up security as wrench attacks increase
cryptoNews.summary: Notable crypto execs descended on Paris Blockchain Week, bringing more attention to personal security as kidnapping and ransom attempts skyrocket.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin rises, oil falls after Iran says Strait of Hormuz is open
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin surged above $76,000 as oil futures fell 10% after Iran’s foreign minister declared the Strait of Hormuz open for the remainder of the ceasefire between the US, Israel and Iran.

cryptoNews.title: Telegram CEO Durov warns EU age-verification app could enable wider tracking
cryptoNews.summary: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov cited claims the EU’s new age-check app was hacked in minutes, warning it could expand into wider online identity controls.

aiNews.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
aiNews.summary: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

aiNews.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
aiNews.summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

aiNews.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
aiNews.summary: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

aiNews.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
aiNews.summary: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

aiNews.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
aiNews.summary: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.
